[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001001 2
1 0111001 4
2 0111010 4
3 0001111 4
4 0010010 2
5 0000000 a
6 0000000 a
7 0101000 2

01 10 1111101 6
12 21 1111111 a
23 32 1111011 6
34 43 0111001 4 match 1
45 54 0111011 5
56 65 0111111 6
67 76 0011111 5
70 07 0111010 4 match 2

02 20 1111010 5
13 31 1011101 5
24 42 1111011 6
35 53 0111011 5
46 64 0111111 6
57 75 0111010 4 match 2
60 06 0101111 5
71 17 1010111 5

03 30 0101001 3
14 41 1111101 6
25 52 1111010 5
36 63 0001111 4 match 3
47 74 0111011 5
50 05 0111010 4 match 2
61 16 1011111 6
72 27 1111010 5

04 40 0111001 4 match 1
15 51 1111111 a
26 62 1111111 a
37 73 0011011 4
